caption: A woman with dark, shoulder-length hair and black-rimmed glasses stands against a solid black background. She is wearing a light green top with small red floral embroidery around the neckline and a thin dark necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her neckline. Throughout the sequence, she looks directly toward the camera while speaking, with her mouth opening and closing and her facial expressions shifting slightly. A small circular logo with the text "NPTEL" appears in the bottom left corner of the first and third scenes and the bottom center of the second and fourth scenes. The woman remains centered in the frame, and the lighting and background remain constant as she continues to talk.
